glosses.vi: mang tính lý thuyết; về lý thuyết

sentences.target: Ich könnte theoretisch morgen früher gehen.

translations.de: Ich könnte theoretisch morgen früher gehen.
translations.en: Technically, I could leave earlier tomorrow.
translations.es: En teoría, podría irme mañana más temprano.
translations.fr: En théorie, je pourrais partir plus tôt demain.
translations.it: In teoria, potrei andare via prima domani.
translations.ko: 내일은 이론상 좀 더 일찍 퇴근할 수 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 按理说我明天可以早点走。
translations.yue: 按道理我聽日可以早啲走。
translations.ru: В принципе, могу завтра уйти пораньше.
translations.pt: Em teoria, eu poderia sair mais cedo amanhã.
translations.he: תיאורטית אני יכול לצאת מחר מוקדם יותר.
translations.tr: Teorik olarak yarın daha erken çıkabilirim.
translations.vi: Về lý thuyết thì ngày mai tôi có thể về sớm hơn.
translations.ar: نظريًا أستطيع أن أغادر أبكر غدًا.
translations.nl: In theorie zou ik morgen eerder weg kunnen.
translations.uk: У принципі, я можу завтра піти раніше.
translations.hi: सैद्धांतिक रूप से मैं कल जल्दी निकल सकता हूँ.
translations.pl: W teorii mogę jutro wyjść wcześniej.
translations.el: Θεωρητικά, θα μπορούσα να φύγω νωρίτερα αύριο.
translations.nb: I prinsippet kan jeg gå tidligere i morgen.
translations.id: Secara teori, saya bisa pulang lebih awal besok.
translations.sv: I teorin skulle jag kunna gå tidigare i morgon.
translations.ro: Teoretic, aș putea pleca mai devreme mâine.
translations.da: I teorien kunne jeg gå tidligere i morgen.
translations.ja: 理屈の上では明日は早く帰れる。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative case; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II) expressing possibility/conditional mood; selects the infinitive 'gehen'.
Sentence adverb qualifying the statement as theoretical; scopes over the whole clause.
Temporal adverb indicating the time reference.
Comparative adverb modifying the manner/time of 'gehen' (earlier than usual/expected).
Main lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'könnte'.

sentences.target: Ich habe theoretisch noch etwas Zeit.

translations.de: Ich habe theoretisch noch etwas Zeit.
translations.en: I technically still have some time.
translations.es: En teoría, todavía tengo algo de tiempo.
translations.fr: En théorie, j’ai encore un peu de temps.
translations.it: In teoria ho ancora un po' di tempo.
translations.ru: В принципе, у меня ещё есть немного времени.
translations.pt: Em teoria, ainda tenho um pouco de tempo.
translations.he: תיאורטית עדיין יש לי קצת זמן.
translations.tr: Teorik olarak hâlâ biraz vaktim var.
translations.vi: Về lý thuyết thì tôi vẫn còn chút thời gian.
translations.ar: נظريًا ما زال لدي بعض الوقت.
translations.nl: In theorie heb ik nog wat tijd.
translations.uk: У принципі, у мене ще є трохи часу.
translations.hu: Elméletileg még van egy kis időm.
translations.hi: सैद्धांतिक रूप से मेरे पास अभी थोड़ा समय है.
translations.nb: I prinsippet har jeg fortsatt litt tid.
translations.id: Secara teori, saya masih punya sedikit waktu.
translations.sv: I teorin har jag fortfarande lite tid.
translations.da: I teorien har jeg stadig lidt tid.
translations.fi: Periaatteessa minulla on vielä vähän aikaa.
translations.ja: 理屈の上ではまだ少し時間がある。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun; subject.
Finite main verb expressing possession in the present tense.
Sentence adverb qualifying the claim as theoretical/with caveats.
Temporal/degree particle meaning 'still/yet', modifying the possession.
Indefinite quantifying determiner modifying the noun 'Zeit'.
Common noun; direct object of 'habe'.

sentences.target: Das wäre theoretisch eine gute Lösung.

translations.de: Das wäre theoretisch eine gute Lösung.
translations.en: That would be a good solution in theory.
translations.es: En teoría, sería una buena solución.
translations.fr: En théorie, ce serait une bonne solution.
translations.it: In teoria sarebbe una buona soluzione.
translations.ko: 이론상 그건 좋은 해결책이 될 수 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 按理说那会是个不错的解决办法。
translations.yue: 按道理呢個會係個好嘅解決方法。
translations.ru: В теории это было бы хорошим решением.
translations.pt: Em teoria, seria uma boa solução.
translations.he: בתיאוריה זה היה יכול להיות פתרון טוב.
translations.tr: Teorik olarak bu iyi bir çözüm olurdu.
translations.vi: Về lý thuyết thì đó sẽ là một giải pháp tốt.
translations.nl: In theorie zou dat een goede oplossing sein.
translations.uk: Теоретично це було б хорошим рішенням.
translations.hi: सैद्धांतिक रूप से यह एक अच्छा समाधान होगा.
translations.el: Θεωρητικά, αυτό θα ήταν μια καλή λύση.
translations.nb: I teorien ville det vært en god løsning.
translations.id: Secara teori, itu akan menjadi solusi yang baik.
translations.sv: I teorin skulle det vara en bra lösning.
translations.ro: Teoretic, ar fi o soluție bună.
translations.cs: Teoreticky by to bylo dobré řešení.
translations.da: I teorien ville det være en god løsning.
translations.ja: 理屈の上ではそれはいい解決策だろう。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun functioning as subject ('that').
Copular auxiliary in Konjunktiv II, linking subject to a predicative nominal.
Sentence adverb qualifying the copular clause as theoretical.
Indefinite article marking the predicate noun phrase.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Lösung'; agrees in case/number/gender.
Common noun; head of the predicative nominal complement to 'wäre'.

sentences.target: Der Zug kommt theoretisch alle zehn Minuten.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ tsuːk kɔmt teoˈʁeːtɪʃ ˈalə tseːn miˈnuːtən/

translations.de: Der Zug kommt theoretisch alle zehn Minuten.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ tsuːk kɔmt teoˈʁeːtɪʃ ˈalə tseːn miˈnuːtən/
translations.en: Technically, the train comes every ten minutes.
translations.es: En teoría, el tren pasa cada diez minutos.
translations.fr: En théorie, le train passe toutes les dix minutes.
translations.it: In teoria, il treno passa ogni dieci minuti.
translations.zh-Hans: 按理说火车每十分钟一班。
translations.yue: 按道理火車每十分鐘一班。
translations.ru: Теоретически поезд ходит каждые десять минут.
translations.pt: Em teoria, o trem passa a cada dez minutos.
translations.he: תיאורטית הרכבת מגיעה כל עשר דקות.
translations.tr: Teorik olarak tren her on dakikada bir gelir.
translations.vi: Về lý thuyết thì tàu đến mỗi mười phút.
translations.ar: נظريًا القطار يصل כל عشر دقائق.
translations.nl: In theorie komt de trein elke tien minuten.
translations.uk: Теоретично поїзд ходить кожні десять хвилин.
translations.hi: सैद्धांतिक रूप से ट्रेन हर दस मिनट में आती है.
translations.pl: Teoretycznie pociąg przyjeżdża co dziesięć minut.
translations.el: Θεωρητικά, το τρένο έρχεται κάθε δέκα λεπτά.
translations.nb: I teorien kommer toget hvert tiende minutt.
translations.id: Secara teori, kereta datang setiap sepuluh menit.
translations.sv: I teorin kommer tåget var tionde minut.
translations.ro: Teoretic, trenul vine la fiecare zece minute.
translations.cs: Teoreticky jezdí vlak každých deset minut.
translations.da: I teorien kommer toget hvert tiende minut.
translations.fi: Periaatteessa juna tulee kymmenen minuutin välein.
translations.ja: 理屈の上では電車は10分おきに来る。

tokens.explanation: Definite article introducing the subject noun.
Common noun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb in present tense; describes arrival.
Sentence adverb marking the statement as theoretical/ideal schedule.
Distributive quantifying determiner modifying 'Minuten' ('every').
Cardinal numeral modifying 'Minuten' as a measure.
Plural common noun; temporal measure phrase expressing frequency ('every ten minutes').
